(Prospective) Tenant Life Support!
ran into friend mine recently who helps manage very large portfolio rental properties.
She always has the funniest stories tell, and just had pass this one on.
They had running for rental property nice area town.
was typical bedroom bread and butter house and there had been lot interest this particular property.
She said that until just before closing, she had the usual run the mill tenant applications.
Then the very last minute before closing, lady ran into the office waving cash and said she had put her application today.
She told the property manager that she was going have move quickly she currently lived two story house with the bedrooms the second floor.
The applicant said this house was the right location, and she reiterated that needed least one first floor bedroom.
She said this house would perfect!
